title: Just Barricades
description: Breakable and repairable barricade blocks for zombie apocalypse
body:
# About
This mod was ordered by **wayuluv**, for his modpack

It adds breakable and reapairable barricade blocks, that slow down zombies from breaking into your base.

It's intended to be played with the [TaCZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero) mod, and optionally in zombie-apocalypse-type modpack, but it can be used for anything else. 

![In-Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa7165de8c0ce861b4eb78ccad3ac48adab60b9_0.webp)

# Barricade blocks
![Barricades in all variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6cbdd5c4dc4a33c692ed87c01692694fdcfdbc2_0.webp)

All wood variants of the barricades block (except nether wood)

Mob's AI will try to go through the barricades

Zombies destroy barricades (configurable)

Barricades can be repaired by right-clicking (configurable)

Requiers a stick for repairing, which is also dropped when broken (configurable)

![Zombie getting through a barricade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d9480ee57b45a527187557bc90c7988525e75d5.gif)
 
# Configuration
![Config screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a85911a87d8db38ae6845d7fbb38b144b094ec2.png)

# Compatibility
Integrated compatibility with TaCZ

Recommended to be used with some configuration screen mod

 
# Reports / Suggestions
If you have any suggestions or ideas, please let us know on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/xByznP7RHw)

If you encounter some bugs, please create an issue on the [GitHub](https://github.com/Tejty/Just_Barricades/issues)

[![Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7687f60c02535d479dc55156b8de1a776f63ebbb.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty)

[![Custom mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2e75104b0340c21d2685ed2d81a8ee8b1be0936.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty/commissions)
